case_title: LEONID K PRESIER VS. ANTIPOV DENTAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRESLER, LEONID K AS TO DEFENDANT ANTIPOV DENTAL, INC. DBA     COSMO DENTAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRESLER, LEONID K IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANTIPOV DENTAL, INC. DBA     COSMO DENTAL PLAINTIFF DID NOT SHOW ANY MALPRACTICE OR DAMAGE FROM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-25-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-25-2019 BY MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF LEONID K. PRESLER, ASSISTED BY HIS SON ALEX PRESLER WHO INTERPRETS FOR PLAINTIFF FROM RUSSIAN TO ENGLISH AND ENGLISH TO RUSSIAN IS PRESENT. INTERPERTER'S OATH IS GIVEN TO ALEX PRESLER. DEFENDANT ANTIPOV DENTAL, INC., DBA COSMO DENTAL REPRESENTED BY OLGA ANTIPOVA, DDS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVEIWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT.
